assertions.title: Intraday series render with shared time axis (8 PM – 8 AM)

steps.expected: Glucose and heart-rate MetricStrips plus hypnogram share one 8 PM–8 AM axis
steps.observed: No glucose strip rendered; only one heart-rate strip/panel context is visible and hypnogram panel shows 'No sleep stage data available'.

assertions.issues: Required multi-strip shared overnight axis (glucose + heart-rate + hypnogram) was not present on the rerun surface.

assertions.title: Sleep hypnogram renders with stage differentiation

steps.action: Inspect Night sleep panel for stage bars and legend
steps.observed: Panel displayed 'No sleep stage data available' and no stage bars/legend were rendered.

assertions.issues: Hypnogram stage differentiation requirement not met on rerun.

assertions.title: Summary strip with polarity-colored delta badges

steps.action: Check SummaryStrip metrics on Night view
steps.expected: Sleep Score, Deep Sleep, Sleep Latency, HRV, and RHR all shown with polarity-aware deltas
steps.observed: Only Sleep Score, Deep Sleep, HRV, and RHR were shown; Sleep Latency metric/delta was missing.

assertions.issues: Summary strip contract failed because Sleep Latency delta badge is absent.

assertions.title: S1 scenario — meal → glucose spike → HR → sleep disruption causal chain

steps.action: Verify S1 chain on Night view
steps.expected: Meal marker, glucose spike, HR follow-on, hypnogram latency/deep-sleep impact, and specified red deltas
steps.observed: Glucose panel and hypnogram stage rendering were absent; required S1 causal chain was not fully visible on screen.

assertions.issues: S1 end-to-end causal visualization contract not satisfied in rerun.

assertions.title: Night view window spans yesterday 8 PM to today 8 AM correctly

steps.expected: time_range start/end = previous day 8 PM to requested day 8 AM
Frontend time axis labels visibly span 8 PM–8 AM
steps.observed: Required full 8 PM–8 AM axis labeling was not visible on the captured UI state.

assertions.issues: Cross assertion failed on frontend axis rendering despite correct API window bounds.

assertions.title: Night view for in-progress night handles incomplete data

steps.action: Capture runtime clock and request today's night payload
steps.expected: In an in-progress night, chart should end near current time and avoid misleading flatline to window end
steps.observed: Runtime (local=2026-04-05T06:08:50-0400, utc=2026-04-05T10:08:50Z) was outside this surface's active overnight window interpretation; returned window was complete (end=2026-04-05T08:00:00.000Z).

assertions.issues: Blocked by runtime precondition: could not execute during an in-progress window for this environment's night-window calculation.

assertions.title: Duration annotation spanning night boundary included

steps.observed: API includes the created annotation in night payload (overlap check true).

steps.action: Check Night UI marker behavior for same date
steps.expected: Boundary-spanning marker rendered at chart left edge (8 PM clamp)
steps.observed: UI did not clearly surface the created annotation as a left-edge boundary marker; created label text not discoverable in rendered page text capture.

assertions.issues: API overlap inclusion passes, but required left-edge marker rendering was not conclusively met in UI evidence.

frictions.resolution: Collected API request/response evidence via curl artifacts for assertion-level network proof.

blockers.description: Could not meet in-progress-night runtime condition during rerun execution window.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Captured runtime clock and re-requested today's night payload; response remained a completed window in this environment.

summary: Reran 7 assigned assertions: 6 failed (VAL-UINGT-001/002/003/004, VAL-CROSS-019, VAL-CROSS-024) and 1 blocked (VAL-CROSS-020 precondition not met).
